titleZh: 甘肃居立门业有限责任公司与庆阳市太一热力有限公司、李昕军公司盈余分配纠纷案
titleEn: Gazette Case: Gansu Juli Door Industry Co., Ltd. v. Qingyang Taiyi Heating Co., Ltd. and Li Xinjun
citation: 公报案例：强制盈余分配
issuesZh: 无决议情况下利润分配
holdingZh: 虽无载明具体分配方案的股东会决议，但在公司存在可分配利润且控股股东变相分配、隐瞒或转移公司利润的情况下，人民法院可以强制盈余分配，以保护少数股东收益权。
holdingEn: Even absent a shareholder resolution specifying a distribution plan, a court may order profit distribution where the company has distributable profits and controlling shareholders have diverted, concealed, or appropriated them to the detriment of minority shareholders.
